title: Being able to send an email thread to different people (CCs) through automations

posts.author: axelestrada123 (Axel Estrada)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Being able to use automations to send an email thread with multiple CCs or recipients. Currently, it sends emails but to individual emails listed on the board. Would be great to just have one email sent out to my group/team to review.

What are you trying to achieve

To only send out one email, to my team to better communicate on situations. Instead of how it is now, that it sends out individual emails to said recipients listed on the board. This way, we can all communicte in one thread.

posts.author: noam.lapidot (Noam Lapidot)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @axelestrada123 You send email and CC’s with Supermail, you can also add attachments, images and design your email(addressing your other post).

SuperMail – Email Automation - monday.com Marketplace SuperMail – Email Automation - monday.com Marketplace
